NCT00853385.snippet: van Vollenhoven RF et al. NEJM 2012;367:508-519 (ORAL-Standard).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* The patient has a diagnosis of RA based upon the American College of Rheumatology (ACR) 1987 Revised Criteria.~* The patient must have had an inadequate response to methotrexate and have active disease, as defined by both: ≥6 joints tender or painful on motion; and ≥6 joints swollen; and fulfills 1 of the following 2 criteria at Screening: 1.ESR (Westergren method) >28 mm in the local laboratory. 2. CRP >7 mg/L in the central laboratory.~* No evidence of active or latent...

NCT02629159.name: SELECT-Compare
NCT02629159.group: Upadacitinib 15 mg daily | JAK1-selective (csDMARD-IR RA; 3-arm Fleischmann 2019, all on background MTX; n=651 upa / n=651 placebo / n=327 ada). Contrast pooled here is upa-vs-PLACEBO (cN=651 = placebo arm, not the n=327 ada arm) per the NMA single-anchor methodology -- ada-vs-placebo enters via FINCH-1. ACR20 wk 12 vs placebo, OR.

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 response at week 12 upadacitinib 15 mg vs placebo (from SELECT-Compare 3-arm)

NCT02629159.snippet: Fleischmann R et al. Arthritis Rheumatol 2019;71:1788-1800 (SELECT-Compare).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Adult male or female, at least 18 years old.~* Diagnosis of RA for greater than or equal to 3 months.~* Subjects must have been on oral or parenteral methotrexate (MTX) therapy greater than or equal to 3 months and on a stable prescription of greater than or equal to 15 to 25 mg/week (or greater than or equal to 10 mg/week in subjects intolerant of MTX at doses greater than or equal to 12.5 mg/week) for at least 4 weeks prior to the first dose of study drug. In addition al...

NCT02889796.name: FINCH-1
NCT02889796.group: Filgotinib 200 mg daily | JAK1-selective (MTX-IR RA; 3-arm Filgo+Ada+Pbo; ACR20 wk 12 vs placebo, OR). Multi-arm trial: control (cE=238/cN=475) is SHARED with NCT02889796B (Ada arm). NMA pooling must apply Cochrane Handbook ch.11 multi-arm covariance ρ=τ²/2 to avoid double-counting the shared control.

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 response at week 12 filgotinib 200 mg vs placebo (from FINCH-1 3-arm)

NCT02889796.snippet: Combe B et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2021;80:848-858 (FINCH-1).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Have a diagnosis of rheumatoid arthritis (RA) [2010 American College of Rheumatology (ACR)/European League Against Rheumatism (EULAR) criteria] , and are ACR functional class I-III.~* Have ≥ 6 swollen joints (from a swollen joint count based on 66 joints (SJC66)) and ≥ 6 tender joints (from a tender joint count based on 68 joints (TJC68)) at both screening and Day 1.~* Ongoing treatment with a stable dose of MTX~Key Exclusion Criteria:~* Previous treatment with any j...

NCT02889796B.name: FINCH-1 (Ada arm)
NCT02889796B.group: Adalimumab 40 mg Q2W SC | Anti-TNF active comparator (from FINCH-1 Ada arm; ACR20 wk 12 vs placebo, OR). Multi-arm trial: control (cE=238/cN=475) is SHARED with NCT02889796 (Filgotinib arm). NMA pooling must apply Cochrane Handbook ch.11 multi-arm covariance ρ=τ²/2.

allOutcomes.title: ACR20 response at week 12 adalimumab 40 mg Q2W vs placebo (from FINCH-1 Ada arm, used as anchor; same Placebo arm as NCT02889796 but independent contrast)

NCT02889796B.snippet: Combe B et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2021;80:848-858 (FINCH-1 Ada arm). Ada-vs-Pbo contrast from the same 3-arm trial; other trials (ORAL, RA-BEAM, SELECT-Compare) also have Ada arms but this single-anchor approach avoids multi-arm covariance inflation.

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: ACR20 response at week 12 (ACR50/70 as secondary) — odds ratio vs Placebo
NMA_CONFIG.note: Star network with Placebo as reference. 4 JAKi classes (JAK1/3, JAK1/2, JAK1-selective x2) + Adalimumab as active-comparator anchor (from FINCH-1's Ada arm). 5 pivotal phase 3 contrasts, no closed loops. Each underlying trial (ORAL-Standard, RA-BEAM, SELECT-Compare, FINCH-1) is 3-arm; we extract only the JAKi-vs-Placebo and one Ada-vs-Placebo contrast to avoid multi-arm covariance issues.
